---
title: Standard Operating Procedures
---

This page is under construction.

## Overview
Here we provide our research community, faculty, and staff with centralized access to the center's Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs). Hosting these documents helps researchers and personnel have immediate access to the critical information necessary to maintain a safe, efficient, and compliant imaging environment.


## SOPs
<details>

<summary> 100: MRI Emergency </summary>

| SOP | Topic | Link | Referenced Forms |
|-----|-----|-----|-----|
| 101 | Hardware | [Document](../resources/sops/100_emergency/1_hardware/sop_101_hardware.pdf){target="_blank"} | [LG01](../resources/forms/form_LG01_hardware_issue.pdf){target="_blank"}, [LG04](../resources/forms/form_LG04_protocol_violation.pdf){target="_blank"}, [RO03](../resources/sops/pics/nd-hnc_layout_zones.png){target="_blank"} |
| 102 | Medical | [Document](../resources/sops/100_emergency/2_medical/sop_102_medical.pdf){target="_blank"} | [LG03](../resources/forms/form_LG03_adverse_event.pdf){target="_blank"}, [LG04](../resources/forms/form_LG04_protocol_violation.pdf){target="_blank"}, [RO03](../resources/sops/pics/nd-hnc_layout_zones.png){target="_blank"} |
| 103 | Adverse Events | Document |

: {tbl-colwidths="[25,25,25,25]"}

</details>


<details>

<summary> 200: ND-HNC Operation </summary>

| SOP | Topic | Link | Referenced Forms |
|-----|-----|-----|-----|
| 201 | MRI Safety Screen | [Document](../resources/sops/200_operation/1_safety_screen/sop_201_safety_screen.pdf){target="_blank"} | [RO01](../resources/forms/form_RO01_mri_screen.pdf){target="_blank"}, [RO03](../resources/sops/pics/nd-hnc_layout_zones.png){target="_blank"} |
| 202 | Zone Access | [Document](../resources/sops/200_operation/2_zone_access/sop_202_zone_access.pdf){target="_blank"} | [RO01](../resources/forms/form_RO01_mri_screen.pdf){target="_blank"} |

: {tbl-colwidths="[25,25,25,25]"}

<!-- | 203 | Incidental Findings | Document |
| 204 | Schedule and Billing | Document | -->

</details>


<details>

<summary> 300: Building Management </summary>

| SOP | Topic | Link | Referenced Forms |
|-----|-----|-----|-----|
| 301 | Building Access | [Document](../resources/sops/300_building/1_access/sop_301_access.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| 302 | Fire and Gas | [Document](../resources/sops/300_building/2_fire_gas/sop_302_fire_gas.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| 303 | Tornado | [Document](../resources/sops/300_building/3_tornado/sop_303_tornado.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| 304 | Active Violence | [Document](../resources/sops/300_building/4_violence/sop_304_violence.pdf){target="_blank"} |

: {tbl-colwidths="[25,25,25,25]"}

</details>



## Forms

<!-- 001: RO01
002: RO02
003: RO03

101: LG01
102: LG03
103: LG04

201: LG02 -->

<details>

<summary> RO: Research Operations</summary>

| Number | Title | Link | |
|-----|-----|-----|-----|
| RO01 | MRI Safety Screen | [Document](../resources/forms/form_RO01_mri_screen.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| RO02 | Arrival Instructions | [Blue](../resources/forms/form_RO02_arrival_blue.pdf){target="_blank"}, [White](../resources/forms/form_RO02_arrival_white.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| RO03 | ND-HNC Layout| [Document](../resources/sops/pics/nd-hnc_layout_zones.png){target="_blank"} |

: {tbl-colwidths="[25,25,25,25]"}

</details>


<details>

<summary> LG: Log Issues and Maintenance</summary>

| Number | Title | Link | |
|-----|-----|-----|-----|
| LG01 | Hardware Issue | [Document](../resources/forms/form_LG01_hardware_issue.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| LG02 | Hardware Maintenance | [Document](../resources/forms/form_LG02_hardware_maintenance.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| LG03 | Adverse Event | [Document](../resources/forms/form_LG03_adverse_event.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| LG04 | Compliance | [Document](../resources/forms/form_LG04_protocol_violation.pdf){target="_blank"} |

: {tbl-colwidths="[25,25,25,25]"}

</details>


<!-- <details>

<summary> 300: Training </summary>

| Number | Title | Link |
|-----|-------|--------|


</details> -->
